title: Excalibur | Serene Seasons Support
description: A retexture for the Serene Seasons mod, designed to fit Maffhew's Excalibur resource pack.
body:
![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4c2e4fdb465302c6b46cbadc73a7b722a0dd1bca.png)

A compatibility resource pack that integrates [Serene Seasons'](https://modrinth.com/mod/serene-seasons) visuals into the [Excalibur](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/excal) texture style.

![Items/Blocks Showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a6c5d643538139451994f306154b58ae4dbfe7aa.png)
